title: benzoin assamicum
intro: Benzoin assamicum, also known as Siam benzoin, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Styrax, and is native to Southeast Asia. Its resin has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of benzoin assamicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Benzoin assamicum can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tinctures, salves, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
